digest.title: Google built a great smart speaker, but Gemini isn’t ready for it
digest.tldr: Smart speakers have spent the past few years searching for a compelling second act.  Beyond music, timers, and controlling your lights, they've struggled to justify taking up space on the kitchen counter.
